'''Sennatt''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] located within the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]], on the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Colonized by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]], it was one of their industrial hubs. [[Publictechnic]]'s main manufacturing plant was located on Sennatt.

{{Planet-stub}}
